## Checklist

- [ ] I was assigned to the issue before opening this pull request
- [ ] My branch is up to date with the main branch
- [ ] The code builds and runs locally without errors
- [ ] No console logs are left in active code paths
- [ ] If database schema changed, both schema.sql and a new migration file are included
- [ ] Documentation has been updated if needed
- [ ] The pull request title follows the Conventional Commits format
- [ ] This pull request description is written in my own words
